# UniAtlas Bosnia

UniAtlas Bosnia is a free, open-source directory of universities, faculties, study programs, and subjects in Bosnia and Herzegovina. The site provides a searchable web interface and a public REST API.

## Public pages

- [Home](https://uniatlas-bosnia.netlify.app/)
- [Universities](https://uniatlas-bosnia.netlify.app/universities)
- [API Docs](https://uniatlas-bosnia.netlify.app/api-docs)

## API access

- [All universities endpoint](https://round-leann-goran-jovic-1010-ccad2ae8.koyeb.app/api/v1/universities)
- [Search universities endpoint](https://round-leann-goran-jovic-1010-ccad2ae8.koyeb.app/api/v1/universities/search?term=sarajevo)
- [Search study programs endpoint](https://round-leann-goran-jovic-1010-ccad2ae8.koyeb.app/api/v1/universities/search-study-programs?term=engineering)
